reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the test's cleanup logic, suggesting a more robust approach to ensure proper PMD split handling.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series adds a new test to the selftests/mm suite, specifically targeting partial mlock functionality on Transparent Huge Pages (THP). The test exercises walk_page_range() with a subset of the THP, which should trigger a PMD split since mlock operates at page granularity.
